titleStmt.title: SII 9.127: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 127. (A.R. No. 442 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE VERANDAH OF THE UDDIBASAVANNA TEMPLE AT MORIGERE, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 98[6], Krōdhi, Pushya, puṇṇami, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1064 December 26, Sunday, in the reign of Vishṇuvardhana-Mahārājādhirāja Vijayādityadēva “lord of Vēṅgi-maṇḍala”. It records that Viayāditya made a gift of some land as [para]mēśvaradatti, after washing the feet of • • • • • śvara-Paṇḍitadēva of Mōṟiṅgeṟe, when he was going on a campaign to the south. It also records a gift made by the Tantrapāla Mailayya, with the permission of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ samastabudhajanāśrayanāhavamallanaṁkakāṟaṁ paramaṇḍaḷasū
rekāṟaṁ janādhāra vairimadamarddana pratāpajanārddananacaḷitavākyaṁ cāḷu
kya madanavipakṣakuḷakāḷadaṇḍaṁ vīramārtaṇḍaṁ ripu hṛda
yasallaṁ sāhasamallaṁ dīnānāthaciṁtāmaṇi maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāmaṇi veṁgimaṇḍaḷēśvaranayya
śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājādhirāja vijayādityadēvar noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsi
nacaḷapravṛttiyiṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷuttamire sakavarṣa 986ne
ya krōdhisaṁvatsarada pauṣyada puṇname yādityavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu
dakṣiṇadiśāvarakke bijayaṁgeyyutta murujeya noḷsamastaśāstrapārāvā
ragarappa ś®manmōriṁgeṟeya noḷaṁbēśvara śvarapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci na
maśyadeṟeyaṁ biṭṭar tatpādapadmōpajīvi nāmāṁkamāḷikāprasastisa
hitaṁ ś®mattaṁtrapāḷa mailayya laguḷidhaṟe mēśvaradattiyāgeyarasargge
binnapaṁgeydu paḍedu biṭṭa śrīmanmiriṁje bhaṭṭa najīyar baredar .
Digital edition of SII 9.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
